case_title: ANGEL XAVIER GONZALEZ VS. LINA OCTAVIA DOMINGUEZ

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY THE PLAINTIFF. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-01-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-01-2016 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-03-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ANGEL XAVIER GONZALEZ. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT LINA OCTAVIA DOMINGUEZ. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. THE COURT INFORMED PLAINTIFF THAT THE PRESENT ACTION IS ESSENTIALLY A FAMILY LAW MATTER, AND AS SUCH, THIS COURT DOES NOT HAVE JURISDICTION. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT SUGGESTS THAT PLAINTIFF SEEK REDRESS IN THE FAMILY LAW COURT. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,504.00 FILED BY GONZALEZ, ANGEL XAVIER AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINGUEZ, LINA OCTAVIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED JUL-05-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINGUEZ, LINA OCTAVIA
